login.title: Login
login.description: Sign in to your account to access My-KM

register.title: Register
register.description: Create a new account to get started with My-KM
register.successDescription: We have sent a verification email to your inbox
register.emailSent: We have sent a verification email to {{email}}. Please click the link in the email to verify your account.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link
forgotPassword.successDescription: If this email is registered, you will receive a password reset email
forgotPassword.checkEmail: Please check your email and click the reset link

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired
resetPassword.passwordDescription: At least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase and numbers
resetPassword.invalidTokenDescription: The password reset link is invalid or has expired
resetPassword.requestNewText: Please request a new password reset
resetPassword.successDescription: You can now login with your new password
resetPassword.resetSuccessText: Your password has been successfully reset. Redirecting to login page...

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.successDescription: Your email has been successfully verified, you can now login
verifyEmail.invalidTokenDescription: This verification link is invalid or has already been used
verifyEmail.tokenExpiredDescription: The verification link has expired, please request a new verification email
verifyEmail.resendHint: Please go to the login page and log in with your credentials, the system will prompt you to verify your email

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.usernameMaxLength: Username must be at most 20 characters
validation.usernamePattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens
validation.bioMaxLength: Bio must be at most 500 characters

errors.generic: Operation failed, please try again later
errors.network: Network connection failed, please check your network
errors.unauthorized: You need to login to access this page
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to access this page
errors.serverError: Server error, please try again later

home.title: Welcome to My-KM
home.subtitle: Powerful Personal Knowledge Management Platform
home.description: My-KM is a powerful knowledge management system that helps you better organize and utilize your knowledge assets.
home.feature1Description: Capture and organize your ideas with Markdown support
home.feature2Description: Connect ideas and visualize your knowledge network
home.feature3Description: Get intelligent insights from your knowledge base
home.footer: © 2026 My-KM. Built with Next.js 16 and TypeScript.

selector.title: Welcome to My-KM
selector.subtitle: VSCode-style AI Knowledge Workstation
selector.unsupportedBrowser: Your browser does not support local file access. We recommend using Chrome 86+ or Edge 86+.

create.title: Create New Project
create.dialogDescription: Enter project information and select a local folder
create.name: Project Name
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the purpose of this project

validation.nameMinLength: Project name must be at least 2 characters
validation.nameMaxLength: Project name must be at most 50 characters
validation.descriptionMaxLength: Project description must be at most 200 characters

card.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this project from recent projects list?
